title: Exquisite Sinner
writer: Alden Brooks, Joseph Farnham, Alice D.G. Miller
actors: Conrad Nagel, Renée Adorée, Paulette Duval
plot: A young bourgeois Dominique Prad spurns his family's lucrative silk business for the bohemian life of an artist. Fleeing his estate to join a band of gypsies, the mentally unstable painter falls in love with a pretty gypsy maiden,...
